chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-39 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 1270/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 13-05-2024 Mr. Muhammad Ayaz Shaikh, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, advocate for applicant. ***** This Transfer Application has been filed only on the ground that in previous round, the trial was pending before the same Judge who had convicted and sentenced the applicant. Hence, there is apprehension that applicant would be dealt in the same manner as the Judge has already made up his mind, which ground is not sustainable in law. After setting aside conviction and sentence by this Court, the trial Court has been required to hold de novo trial and decide the case independently on its own merits without being influenced by previous orders. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application being meritless is dismissed in limine along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
